channel.title: Gallery on the KING's Scribe, 7
channel.description: Recent content in Gallery on the KING's Scribe, 7

item.title: Audio
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description: Teachings, Podcasts and Psalmistry. Pleasant words are honey: sweetness to the soul and health to the bones.

item.title: Graphics
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description: A repository of creative artwork and exegetical designs: Exegetical, Devotional, Humourous, Blessed. Unto our experiential transformation, by the Glory of the LORD GOD, YHVH.

item.title: Video & Reels
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description: Lift up your eyes now, and see this that goes forth: in a video playlist.
